scroll_found.title: Research the Spell Schools scroll at a Research Pedestal

master_spell.title: Learn a Level III spell in any school (Iron's Spellbooks — the highest tier in most schools)

subtitle.text: Sixty spells across nine schools. At Level III, they reshape the fight.

description: ▸ The Spell Schools scroll is the full reference
After the Arcane scroll (Ch05) opened the door,
this one shows you the full building.
└ ✦ Evocation: Fireball, Chain Lightning, Void Tentacles
direct damage, area clear, boss DPS
└ ✦ Holy: Divine Smite, Sacred Ground, Healing
└ ✦ Ender: Blink (teleport), Void Lasso, Ender Shriek
└ ✦ Divination: Scry, True Sight, Detect Magic
└ ✦ Conjuration: Summon Ally, Spectral Wolf, Wisp
└ Each spell has Level I, II, III
└ Level III requires: high mana capacity,
└ Mana scales with: specific ISS items,
└ T.O Magic 'n Extras: traveloptics namespace addon
└ Found in: ISS Arcane Shrine, high-tier spell loot,
└ Unlocks: all 9 schools at full depth,
contains rare T.O Magic 'n Extras item recipes.
Farm ISS Wizards alongside the Eye Hunt.
